docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TSENG, KENNY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VU, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSENG, KENNY $499.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $499.50, THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES THE RENT REFUND IN THE SUM OF $329.50. PLAINTIFF MAY DEPOSIT OR CASH LANDLORD'S CHECK FOR $329.50, AND DEFENDANT WILL RECEIVE AGAINST THE JUDGMENT, OR PLAINTIFF MAY RETURN THE CHECK TO DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT SHALL SATISFY THE TOTAL JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL FILED BY DEFENDANT TSENG, KENNY

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VU, DIANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTT. COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER VIETNAMESE MIHN MUSFELT PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2010 - JUDGMENT.

ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 *GRANTED* PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
